raw.advertiser_name: ようこそ！ポケモンカフェ ～まぜまぜパズル～
raw.message: Fill your home or office with the crisp, high-quality sound from this premium turntable from the experts at U-Turn Audio! This product is eligible for Free Shipping.

hook.summary: Close-up of a Pikachu-themed turntable spinning.
hook.visual_action: A turntable platter featuring a Pikachu illustration rotates continuously against a purple gradient background.

scene_flow: Close-up of the rotating turntable platter featuring a Pikachu graphic.
The camera maintains a steady angle showing the tonearm and the textured black surface of the player.
The rotation continues smoothly with the Pokémon Center logo anchored at the bottom of the frame.
audience_proxy: Pokémon fans and vinyl collectors interested in high-end branded lifestyle products.
